description:
The table displays a single row from a colour palette and attributes table, likely associated with a Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) Croplands layer.
| Pixel Value | Attribute    | R | G | B | Colour Sample |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 65535       | Outside area | 0 | 0 | 0 | black         |
This row indicates that pixels with a Digital Number (DN) value of 65535 are classified as "Outside area" and are represented by an RGB colour of (0, 0, 0), which corresponds to black.
